query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projects FROM projects; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_contacts FROM contacts; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_articles FROM rawArticles; SELECT r.id, r.title, r.weekEnding, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects p WHERE p.reportId = r.id) as project_count FROM reports r ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 5
